message:
test(fnp-python): percentile/quantile empty-input IndexError parity probe

numpy.percentile / numpy.quantile raise IndexError on empty input
(internal kth-element lookup indexes into a 0-length array). Our
in-Rust percentile / quantile paths fall back to numpy on error, so the
exception type is preserved.

Locks that contract: if a future change to percentile/quantile drops
the on-error fallback and surfaces our own ValueError via
map_ufunc_error, this probe will trip.
